defect: voltage glove class wrong or overdue
prompt: Identify the component or condition shown, and name the visible defect cues.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is PPE selection, part of the Safety & Rigging scope. The observed field condition is: voltage glove class wrong or overdue. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: NFPA 70E, OSHA 1910 Subpart I.
title: Identification: PPE selection (residential job)
